blocks.text: Riviera Moretti is an independent studio based in Vienna, specialising in art-directed illustrations for concept-driven architecture, competitions, and pitch entries. Our work explores a painterly and atmospheric approach to visual storytelling, seeking to capture space, lingering light, and narrative beyond literal photorealism. Over the years, our images have contributed to numerous award-winning projects and recognised proposals in both Austrian and international competitions. In a few words, this is what we do here.

Riviera Moretti’s contribution is limited to the production and art direction of architectural visualisations and does not imply authorship or ownership of the architectural projects.
